sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: NRD Cyber Security recorded strong growth and international expansion in 2024
feed.summary: NRD Cyber Security has enjoyed a year of significant growth, innovation and international expansion in 2024. The company generated consolidated revenue of EUR 10,194 million last year, an increase of 37.6% compared to 2023. Net profit increased by 23.3% to EUR 1,012 million last year.

feed.title: Enefit Green interim report for Q1 2025
feed.summary: In Q1 2025, the Enefit Green group's operating income decreased by 3% while operating expenses ( excl. D&A ) increased by 35% compared to Q1 2024. As a result, EBITDA fell by 27% to €31.0m and net profit for the period decreased by €11.8m to €21.7m. ( earnings per share €0.082 ) .
